logos.label: Built with the tools you already love
features.label: 03 — Features
features.heading: Everything you need.
feat.rtl.label: RTL / LTR Native
feat.rtl.title: First-class Arabic support — no hacks, no workarounds
feat.rtl.desc: Switch between RTL and LTR with a single attribute. Every component, animation, and layout responds perfectly.
feat.perf.label: Performance
feat.perf.title: Lighthouse 95+
feat.perf.desc: PPR, optimized fonts, lazy images. Ships fast out of the box.
feat.theme.label: Dark / Light Mode
feat.theme.title: Pixel-perfect in both themes
feat.theme.desc: Full CSS Variables system. localStorage persistence. Smooth transitions.
feat.anim.label: Cinematic Animations
feat.anim.title: GSAP + Framer Motion — scroll-driven storytelling
feat.anim.desc: Page load sequences, ScrollTrigger reveals, custom cursor, particle canvas. Every animation is purposeful.
feat.dx.label: Developer Experience
feat.dx.title: TypeScript strict mode, fully typed
feat.dx.desc: Every component documented. Biome for linting. Zero guesswork.
feat.tokens.label: Design Tokens
feat.tokens.title: Brand it in 30 seconds
feat.tokens.desc: Change your brand color once in globals.css and the entire template updates.
how.label: 05 — Process
how.heading: From install to
how.sub: No complex setup. No server configurations. Just clone, fill your .env, and deploy.
how.s1.title: Clone and install with pnpm
how.s1.after: inside the project. TypeScript, Tailwind v4, Biome, shadcn/ui — all pre-configured.
how.s2.title: Fill in your .env.local
how.s2.after: and add your API keys. Every variable is documented.
how.s3.title: Brand it in 30 seconds
how.s3.after: and everything updates. RTL flips with one attribute.
how.s4.title: Push to Vercel, go live
how.s4.after: or connect your GitHub repo. Live in under 2 minutes.

faq.label: 09 — FAQ
faq.heading: Got
faq.sub: Can't find your answer? Email us and get a response within 24 hours.
faq.q1: Is this a real Next.js project or just an HTML template?
faq.a1: This is a full Next.js 16 App Router project with TypeScript — not converted HTML. You get clean, production-ready React components, proper routing, and a working dev server from the very first command.
faq.q2: How does the RTL support actually work?
faq.a2: Every component uses logical CSS properties. The ThemeProvider manages direction — switching the locale to Arabic flips the entire layout including animations and spacing automatically.
faq.q3: Can I use this for client projects?
faq.a3: Pro and Complete licenses allow unlimited client projects. No per-project fee.
faq.q4: Does it work with backends other than Supabase (e.g. Laravel)?
faq.a4: Yes. The frontend is completely decoupled. Connect it to any backend via REST or GraphQL — Laravel, Django, Node.js, or any other stack.
faq.a5: All future version updates at no additional cost — new sections, improvements, dependency updates, and compatibility fixes — forever.
faq.a6: Yes. If you are not satisfied within 7 days of purchase and have not deployed to production, we offer a full refund — no questions asked.
cta.label: — Ready?
cta.sub: Your next project is 5 minutes from being live. Every hour on boilerplate is an hour not spent on what matters.
cta.note: One-time payment · Lifetime updates · RTL included · 7-day guarantee
footer.tagline: The SaaS starter kit that converts. Built with Next.js 16 and first-class RTL support.
